ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier used for the subject in the experiment */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the subject enrolled in the experiment */,
  "last_participation_date" TEXT /* Date the subject last participated in an experiment */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational level of the subject */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject participating in the trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the session */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the subject in milliseconds */,
  "choice" INTEGER /* Choice made by the subject (0 or 1) */,
  "item_value_0" REAL /* Value of the first item presented in the trial */,
  "item_value_1" REAL /* Value of the second item presented in the trial */,
  "gaze_0" REAL /* Gaze duration on the first item */,
  "gaze_1" REAL /* Gaze duration on the second item */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Free, Constrained) */,
  "gaze_L_bin3" REAL /* Gaze duration on the left item (binned into 3 intervals) */,
  "gaze_R_bin3" REAL /* Gaze duration on the right item (binned into 3 intervals) */,
  "trial_og" INTEGER /* Original trial number (before any modifications) */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trial */,
  "trial_conditions" TEXT /* Specific conditions or constraints applied during the trial */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus used in the trial (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stimulus presented during the trial */,
  "response_device" TEXT /* Device used by the subject to respond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_item_value_1 FOREIGN KEY ("item_value_1") REFERENCES items ("value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_og FOREIGN KEY ("trial_og") REFERENCES trials ("trial_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_item_value_0 FOREIGN KEY ("item_value_0") REFERENCES items ("value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject participating in the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Free, Constrained) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "session_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier used for the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_session_type FOREIGN KEY ("session_type") REFERENCES session_types ("session_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier used for the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the item */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "item_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaze_data" (
  "gaze_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaze data entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "gaze_0" REAL /* Gaze duration on the first item */,
  "gaze_1" REAL /* Gaze duration on the second item */,
  "gaze_L_bin3" REAL /* Gaze duration on the left item (binned into 3 intervals) */,
  "gaze_R_bin3" REAL /* Gaze duration on the right item (binned into 3 intervals) */,
  "gaze_start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of each gaze event */,
  "gaze_end_time" INTEGER /* End time of each gaze event */,
  "gaze_duration_variance" REAL /* Variance in gaze duration across trials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gaze_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaze_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "choice" INTEGER /* Choice made by the subject (0 or 1) */,
  "item_id_0" INTEGER /* ID of the first item presented */,
  "item_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the second item presented */,
  "choice_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the subject in their choice */,
  "choice_reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time for each choice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choices_item_id_0 FOREIGN KEY ("item_id_0") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choices_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choices_item_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("item_id_1") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "rt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the subject in milliseconds */,
  "reaction_time_variance" REAL /* Variance in reaction times across trials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title or position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent or browser type used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_types" (
  "session_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session type */,
  "session_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the session type (e.g., Free, Constrained) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session type */,
  "session_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the session type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
